checks.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider huggingface
checks.evidence: Generated embeddings-huggingface-bge-base-en-v15-title-abstract-gen022.json with 1,400 document embeddings, 225 query embeddings, 768 dimensions, and model BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector
checks.evidence: BGE hybrid reached graded nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4915 in offline evaluation.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:ltr
checks.evidence: BGE-feature coordinate LTR reached nDCG@10 0.3541; BGE-feature boosted-tree LTR reached nDCG@10 0.3603 and binary nDCG@20 0.4910 under query-grouped cross-validation.

checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: Node tests passed; MDE parser checked project JSON/JSONL files; traceability validator checked required IDs through GEN-022 and BGE artifacts; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deferred to a follow-up generation so the offline BGE winner can be validated in a separate candidate index without changing the public/default architecture.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-022 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

high_findings.summary: Candidate architecture promotion still requires transferability policy to be addressed.
BGE vector/hybrid beats refined PRF offline but needs remote OpenSearch vector/hybrid validation before promotion.

medium_findings.summary: BGE-feature LTR has the best graded offline nDCG@10 but may not justify complexity versus simpler BGE hybrid retrieval.

evidence_quality: GEN-022 validates that dedicated retrieval embeddings materially improve Cranfield offline, while preserving the production promotion boundary.
